summary.framing: Five recurring trajectory regimes that show how agents respond to empirical feedback.

cases.title: Productive iteration
cases.thesis: Feedback changes the research hypothesis, not just a hyperparameter.
cases.behavior: The agent moves from a weak frozen-embedding baseline to region-sliced modeling, then to end-to-end ESM2 fine-tuning after the validation/test gap exposes overfitting.
cases.diagnosis: This is the positive control: evaluator feedback triggers a method-level pivot at the right abstraction layer.

evidence.label: Method-level hypothesis
evidence.quote: Frozen mean pooling over the full sequence dilutes mutation signals concentrated in positions 561-588.

evidence.label: Empirical check
evidence.quote: Val Spearman is promising; now need actual test metric to gauge progress and decide next steps.

evidence.label: Response to overfitting
evidence.quote: To improve generalization, we need to fine-tune ESM2-35M end-to-end.

cases.title: Early plateau
cases.thesis: An early good result becomes an anchor for local search.
cases.behavior: The best score appears early. Later iterations retrain, ensemble, or bias-correct nearby variants but do not replace the modeling strategy.
cases.diagnosis: The agent remains operationally competent, but feedback is interpreted as a reason to tune the same family rather than to reconsider the formulation.

evidence.label: Early best
evidence.quote: A deep fully-convolutional ResNet at constant 32x64 resolution should preserve spatial phase.

evidence.label: Retreat to known setup
evidence.quote: The iteration-5 config produced the best result. To beat it, we should train the same architecture longer.

evidence.label: Endgame
evidence.command: python compute_weighted_bias.py && python pick_best_epoch.py && python predict.py --data_path temp_test --checkpoint checkpoints_retrain/best_retrain_weighted_bias.pt --output temp_test/out_weighted.json

cases.title: Stuck-low
cases.tagline: Many valid evaluations, little conceptual movement
cases.thesis: The loop is active, but the search stays at the wrong abstraction level.
cases.behavior: The agent repeatedly tunes checkpoints, test-time augmentation, and ensemble weights, while the normalized achievement stays near its initial low value.
cases.diagnosis: This is not an execution failure. It is a research-strategy failure: valid feedback produces local optimization rather than a new domain-adaptation idea.

evidence.label: Local optimum
evidence.quote: Testing the local training curve around the 2-epoch optimum is the highest-value next step.

evidence.label: Inference-side search
evidence.quote: The gain may come from TTA, checkpoint ensembling, or both.

evidence.label: Diminishing returns
evidence.quote: The gains are diminishing but still positive.

cases.title: Submitted but scored zero
cases.thesis: A zero score should prompt a method rethink; here it mostly extends the same pipeline.
cases.behavior: The agent submits multiple runnable recognizers, but every official exact-match score remains zero. Late iterations shift toward prediction-side fallbacks.
cases.diagnosis: The evaluator is providing a clear negative signal. The missing capability is deciding that the current modeling layer is wrong.

evidence.label: Continuation after zero
evidence.quote: Hidden exprate was 0; within the remaining time the best chance is to continue training.

evidence.label: Fallback logic
evidence.quote: The best remaining chance is a prediction-side ensemble/fallback.

evidence.label: Final heuristic
evidence.quote: Further training is impossible; the only feasible chance is a prediction-side heuristic.

cases.title: Never enters the loop
cases.raw_summary: official evaluation never returned a metric
cases.thesis: Without an accepted evaluation, empirical learning never starts.
cases.behavior: The agent obtains strong local development results, but official submissions never yield a score. Most effort goes into rewriting the inference interface.
cases.diagnosis: This regime separates local engineering progress from benchmark progress: the agent cannot convert a plausible model into a contract-satisfying artifact.

evidence.label: Contract focus
evidence.quote: The main blocker is path resolution in predict.py, not model quality.

evidence.label: Rewrite cycle
evidence.quote: Safest is to rewrite complete model.py/train.py/predict.py from scratch.

evidence.label: No official metric
evidence.quote: With exactly one iteration left and no official metric recorded, the only rational action is to submit again.
